text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 365 

PRE_ICL_LTCP_COPAY_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Long Term Care Pharmacy Copay for 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a 1-month supply of the drugs on this tier, 
using long term care pharmacy (LTCP) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_LTCP_COPAY_1M 

TYPE: NUM
